notes: Q-A step 3 (play-to-anatomy). play-black front-matter declares hip_flexor_complex + glute_max as required (spec §9; play-black.md:22-26). Both anatomy concept pages exist today and must surface.

Q-A steps 2+4 (drill prescription). play-black demands_anatomy {hip_flexor_complex, glute_max, ankle_complex, core_outer}. Compiled anatomy-to-drill.json maps those to exercise-hip-thrust (glute_max+hip_flexor_complex), drill-back-extension (core_outer+glute_max primary), drill-band-lateral-walk (glute_max primary + ankle_complex secondary), drill-bird-dog (core_outer primary), drill-ankling (ankle_complex primary). Forbidden checks compiler does not over-match: shoulder-press drills target upper-body regions not on this play.

Negative Q-A. play-skipper exists but has no demands_anatomy/demands_techniques front-matter, so play-to-anatomy[play-skipper] is undefined. Verifies the Engine does NOT hallucinate anatomy edges for unannotated plays (spec §6 invariant: no inference in compile path).

Q-B steps 1-3 (readiness filter). hip_flexor_complex is flagged; anatomy-to-play[hip_flexor_complex] returns play-black at criticality=required, so play-black lands in the EXCLUDE set. The SAFE set of playable-tonight plays excludes play-black. Verifies the required-criticality gating in spec §7 Q-B step 2 (compiled/anatomy-to-play.json).

Q-B edge case. ankle_complex is declared optional (not required) on play-black. Spec §7 Q-B step 2 excludes only criticality==required — so a flagged ankle does NOT remove play-black from the SAFE set. Verifies the binary required/optional gating introduced in spec §2 decision 2 (play-black.md:27-28).

Q-B step 4 (recovery_work PRESCRIPTION via anatomy-to-drill, emphasis=primary). Compiled anatomy-to-drill[glute_max] = [drill-back-extension primary, drill-band-lateral-walk primary, exercise-hip-thrust primary]. drill-bird-dog trains core_outer primary (not glute_max); drill-ankling trains ankle_complex primary (not glute_max) — both correctly excluded. Verifies the primary-emphasis filter in spec §7 Q-B step 4.

Q-C (drill justification). exercise-hip-thrust.md front-matter declares trains_anatomy=[{glute_max:primary},{hip_flexor_complex:secondary}] and trains_techniques=[{explosive-first-step:primary}]. Spec §7 Q-C step 4 (anatomy-to-play[region] filter=required) returns play-black for both glute_max and hip_flexor_complex (both required on play-black). Verifies the justification query is populated from front-matter only — no prose inference (spec §6 invariant).
